summary: Completed testing of Jobs page filter fixes. All backend tests pass (11/11). Frontend filter functionality working correctly for Instalando, Pausado, Agendado, and Aguardando statuses. Identified one issue: archived items still visible for installer view.

minor.issue: 404 Not Found - but not critical to main functionality

ui_bugs.issue: Archived items (Item 3 with Qty 2.5) still visible for installer Elvis. Should filter out archived items for installer role.

action_items: Filter out archived items from getJobProducts() for installer role in JobDetail.jsx
Update Produtos count and Quantidade total to exclude archived items for installer view
critical_code_review_comments: JobDetail.jsx getJobProducts() returns ALL products regardless of archived status - installers should not see archived items

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Filters work correctly, archived items visibility issue for installer

seed_data_creation: Test jobs already created: Elvis Agendado (20d989dc-...), Instalando Bruno, Pausado
context_for_next_testing_agent: Filter functionality for Jobs page confirmed working. The monthFilter bug was fixed - when status filter is active, month filter is ignored. Next focus: verify archived items are hidden for installer role after fix is applied.
